purpose: Machine-readable state for exploratory trial localization. This file is for agents and scripts, not human translation review.

policy.strategy: Probe discovered display candidates with fast-fail batch smoke tests, then keep accepted entries in normal rewrite maps.
policy.passScope: A trial pass proves build, install, startup, and new-game smoke safety only. It does not prove wording, layout, hover coverage, or all UI paths.
policy.csvOriginalRule: Do not use docs/review/known-texts.csv Original as an IL rewrite Original. It is normalized for review. Use the exact DLL catalog Value.
policy.skipPolicy: Keep SkippedByPolicy for technical/internal text, semantic-free grammar glue, date/season logic, external online flows, raw IDs, paths, and static config candidates classified as unsafe.

batchSizing.failureAdjustment: If a batch fails, bisect. If more than one bad entry is found in the batch, halve the next batch size for that source class.

reviewSnapshot.notes: After trial-final-visible-fragments-1: remaining TrialCandidate rows are 0. The final batch had 13 inputs: 11 newly accepted by new-game smoke, 2 were already mapped, and 0 were rejected. Pure raw formatter tags such as [HILL] / [HILL:S] are classified as SkippedByPolicy because they are parser-resolved tags, not human-readable English.

latestSmoke.notes: Fresh installed build smoke reached the main loop. One immediately prior repeat stayed on the main menu without crash/log update and is treated as click/focus automation noise; rerun passed.

knownRejectedSingles.reason: Conflicts with verified UI offset patch 490295, which expects original Leave. Migrate or remove the offset fallback before retrying this entry.

knownRejectedSingles.original: Launch the game in a borderless window (0), fullscreen (1) or window (2)
knownRejectedSingles.reason: UserSetting descriptions are serialized into Settings.xml without XML-safe encoding; non-ASCII trial text polluted Settings.xml and caused 'Error Loading User Settings' on later launches.

knownRejectedSingles.original: * * *  WARNING  * * *  Right now, setting this to fullscreen can lower the framerate considerably and may cause the game to crash. It is recommended you use borderless window setting (0) instead.
knownRejectedSingles.reason: UserSetting descriptions are serialized into Settings.xml without XML-safe encoding; non-ASCII trial text polluted Settings.xml and caused 'Error Loading User Settings' on later launches.

knownCatalogPrecisionFailures.reason: Initial non-exact batch hit build-time original mismatches caused by hidden leading/trailing spaces. Exact catalog-value rerun accepted the remaining entries.
Initial non-exact batch used review CSV normalized whitespace/newlines and failed original matching. Exact catalog-value rerun accepted the remaining entries.

One entry used the wrong IL offset for '% bonus to [Combat Power|POWER]'; corrected offset 338 was accepted in retry. A single-entry StackOverflow/WER on 'Each additional Family provides a' passed on retry and is treated as intermittent smoke noise, not an unsafe text.
Several UI originals were generated from normalized review text and missed leading/trailing spaces. Exact catalog-value retry accepted all failed entries.
The first condition-text batch exceeded MaxTestRuns after multiple build-time original mismatches caused by hidden trailing spaces. Exact catalog-value retry accepted the remaining failed entries.

Initial run 20260701-120913 produced rejected.json only because the final accepted-only smoke also failed to enter the main loop. The evidence was renamed to rejected.invalid-smoke.json and the same 4 entries passed in run 20260701-134002.

Two MapUtils placement strings used stale MethodToken 0x06000aca from an old candidate source. Fresh DLL catalog showed token 0x06000091; exact-token retry in trial-common-map-placement-1 accepted both entries. Treat as catalog precision failure, not unsafe text.

First combined smoke failed because the screenshot step could not find the game window. Sub-batches and final accepted-only smoke passed, rejected.json was empty. Treat as automation noise, not an unsafe text.

Initial batch used normalized review CSV originals and missed required leading/trailing spaces in ClanTraitTooltip strings. Exact catalog-value retry in trial-common-tooltip-visible-2-exact accepted both entries.

batches.notes: Preserve concept identifiers after the pipe.
Two UserSetting entries polluted Settings.xml with non-ASCII comments and caused Error Loading User Settings. The six non-UserSetting entries were retried in trial-common-concepts-help-13-safe-retry.

Two MapUtils entries initially failed because the batch used stale MethodToken 0x06000aca. Evidence was moved to rejected.invalid-catalog-token.json and corrected token 0x06000091 entries were accepted in trial-common-map-placement-1.
Initial combined smoke reported At the Gates window not found, then bisection and final accepted-only smoke passed. Treat as automation/window-finder noise, not unsafe text.
Non-exact trial-common-tooltip-visible-2 failed at build because review CSV normalized leading/trailing spaces; exact catalog values passed.
Initial combined smoke failed at screenshot capture with 'At the Gates window not found'. Both half-batches passed and no single text was rejected; treat as automation/window-finder noise.
Accepted remaining visible display fragments after classifying technical/internal strings and pure formatter tags out of TrialCandidate.

priority: No TrialCandidate rows remain after the 2026-07-02 final visible-fragment trial. Future localization work should start from new screenshots/reproduction steps, new static extraction, or a deliberate retry of a documented SkippedByPolicy class.

Keep SkippedByPolicy for technical/internal text, semantic-free grammar glue, date/season logic, external online flows, raw IDs, paths, pure formatter tags, parser match tokens, and static config candidates classified as unsafe.
Use exact DLL catalog Value, MethodToken, and ILOffset for any new IL rewrite batch; do not use normalized docs/review/known-texts.csv Original as a patch Original.
